articles.title: Trump mixes patriotism with partisanship as he celebrates America’s ‘joyous’ 250th anniversary
articles.description:
“We will always be on top,” Trump said. "We will never let our country fall. We will always be the best.”

The post Trump mixes patriotism with partisanship as he celebrates America’s ‘joyous’ 250th anniversary appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump celebrated America's 250th anniversary with a speech emphasizing patriotism and national pride.
The event highlighted a partisan divide, impacting local political discussions in Boston.
Residents may see increased political engagement as the anniversary sparks national pride.
